title: Alphabet and Numbers
description: This mod adds a lot of what it sounds like, all the letters, as well as numbers 0-9, it also adds a fox mug, fox clothes, and a fox plush for those who love fox's. I made this mod for my sister because she loves foxes and also because I needed letters and
body: This mod adds a lot of what it sounds like, all the letters, as well as numbers 0-9, it also adds a fox mug, fox clothes, and a fox plush for those who love fox's. I made this mod for my sister because she loves foxes and also because I needed letters and numbers for a world I was making for her.
